result.stdout:
Rhinox Migrate CLI

Usage: rhinox migrate <command> [options]

Commands:
  plan         Show pending changes without writing
  generate     Generate migration file from schema changes
  apply        Apply pending migrations to database
  status       Show migration status

Options:
  --connection <conn>       PostgreSQL connection string (required for apply/status; optional for plan/generate to diff against live DB)
  --migrations-dir <path>   Migrations directory (default: db/migrations)
  --schema-dir <path>       Schema directory (default: db/schema)
  --name <name>             Custom migration name (for plan/generate)
  --target <prefix>         Apply up to specific migration (for apply)
  --repair                  Repair checksums for modified migration files (for apply)
